name: nightshift-072-bountyproof
description: BountyProof build 072 - wallet-first bounty submission review and proof minting

scripts.dev:server: npm --prefix packages/nightshift-art-kit run build && tsx watch src/server/index.ts
scripts.build: npm --prefix packages/nightshift-art-kit run build && npm run build:client && npm run build:server
scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix packages/nightshift-art-kit run build && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.server.json --noEmit
